root_cause: Transformers 4.50.0 imports integrations.flex_attention and decorates WrappedFlexAttention with torch.compiler.disable, but torch 2.0.1 does not expose torch.compiler.
resolution: Pin Transformers 4.49.0, whose official package supports torch>=2.0 and whose FlexAttention integration does not call torch.compiler, then validate the actual SegFormer class import during setup.
